summary: Tested all QuickLabel features via Playwright on file:///app/quicklabel.html. All 16 features from the review request tested and passed.
critical_code_review_comments: settings-btn onclick is set via JS (line 2167) instead of HTML attribute - minor but inconsistent with other buttons that use onclick= in HTML. Not a bug.
seed_data_creation: Added test ingest type FR=Fresh Rhizomorph and agar formula CWA=Corn Water Agar via settings UI (stored in localStorage, cleared on reload)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified working. App is a single file HTML with localStorage only. Tests run at file:///app/quicklabel.html. Key tests: workflow switching (4 workflows), lot ID prefixes (AL-, SP-/SS-/etc, LC-, GL-), lineage notation SVG line, settings CRUD for ingest types/agar formulas, field visibility toggles, disabled dropdown items, reset form, lot counter independence.

test_results.agar_plate_workflow: PASS - shows Agar Formula field, lot label 'Agar Lot ID', prefix AL-
test_results.ingest_workflow: PASS - shows Media/Source Type dropdown and Provenance field, SP prefix for Spore Print
test_results.liquid_culture_workflow: PASS - shows Vessel Type field, LC- prefix
test_results.grain_spawn_workflow: PASS - grain type field visible, GL- prefix
test_results.lineage_notation_on_own_svg_line: PASS - F0.T0 appears as .lbl-notation SVG element
test_results.agar_label_preview: PASS - AL- prefix, notation F0.T0, 'Agar Plate', 'Media: MEA'
test_results.settings_panel: PASS - opens with Lineage Fields (3 toggles), Ingest Types (CRUD), Agar Formulas (CRUD)
test_results.field_visibility_toggle: PASS - hiding Filial hides field, adds 'hide-filial' class to form-panel
test_results.custom_ingest_type: PASS - added FR/Fresh Rhizomorph, appears in dropdown
test_results.custom_agar_formula: PASS - added CWA, persisted in settings
test_results.lot_counter_independence: PASS - AL- and GL- counters independent
test_results.disabled_dropdown_items: PASS - no onclick on disabled items
